phrases.intent_en: Ask where the square fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a fonte da praça?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH FOHNG-tih DUH PRAH-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: The fountain historically served as a central water source for Évora's main public square.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no centro exato da praça.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo eh-ZAH-too DUH PRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the exact center of the square.

responses.english: Good morning, in the exact center of the square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo eh-ZAH-too DUH PRAH-suh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no centro exato da praça.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar um bilhete combinado para atrações locais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR OONNG bee-LYEH-tih koom-bee-NAH-doo PUH-ruh uht-ruh-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira combinada municipal, localizada no posto de informação turística. Os guias oficiais de Évora também podem ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh koom-bee-NAH-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL, loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh NOO POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh. OOSH GEEUHSH aw-fee-SEEEYESH DIH EH-voo-ruh tahnm-BAYNG PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the municipal combined ticket office, located at the tourist information point. The official guides of Évora can also help.

responses.english: Go to the municipal combined ticket office, located at the tourist information point. The official guides of Évora can also help.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh koom-bee-NAH-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL, loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh NOO POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh. OOSH GEEUHSH aw-fee-SEEEYESH DIH EH-voo-ruh tahnm-BAYNG PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira combinada municipal, localizada no posto de informação turística. Os guias oficiais de Évora também podem ajudar.

phrases.text_local: Onde é o ponto de encontro para as visitas guiadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW POHNG-too DIH ayng-KOHNGT-roo PUH-ruh UHSH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Guides typically gather visitors near the iconic columns for historical introductions.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao posto de informação turística ou pergunte a um guia oficial de Évora.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the tourist information point or ask an official guide of Évora.

responses.english: Go to the tourist information point or ask an official guide of Évora.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao posto de informação turística ou pergunte a um guia oficial de Évora.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy city tickets
phrases.cultural_note: Urban ticket machines accept cards and provide receipts for public transport validation.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao posto de informação turística.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the tourist information office.

responses.english: Go to the tourist information office.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao posto de informação turística.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o posto de informação turística?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff provide maps and historical brochures specifically curated for Évora's heritage sites.

likely_response.local: Pode pedir informações a um voluntário de turismo ou ao agente de bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH AH OONNG voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo DIH too-REEZH-moo OHW OW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask for information from a tourism volunteer or the ticket agent.

responses.english: You can ask for information from a tourism volunteer or the ticket agent.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH AH OONNG voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo DIH too-REEZH-moo OHW OW uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Pode pedir informações a um voluntário de turismo ou ao agente de bilheteira.

phrases.text_local: Onde é o ponto de encontro para as visitas guiadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW POHNG-too DIH ayng-KOHNGT-roo PUH-ruh UHSH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guia oficial de Évora ou dirija-se ao posto de informação turística.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask an official guide from Évora or go to the tourist information point.

responses.english: Ask an official guide from Évora or go to the tourist information point.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOWN too-REESH-tee-kuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um guia oficial de Évora ou dirija-se ao posto de informação turística.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman wall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a muralha romana aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AH moo-RAH-lyuh roo-MAHN-nuh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: The Roman wall fragments are integrated into later medieval structures near the temple grounds.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia oficial de Évora.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the official guide from Évora.

responses.english: Ask the official guide from Évora.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh.
